prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile shows a DIFFERENT medium-sized object as the clear MAIN SUBJECT — prominent, detailed and standing tall, on only a small low patch of clear blue water. The object dominates and fills the tile; keep the ground base minimal and thin — NOT a tall dirt pedestal or block with a small object on top. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a wooden rowboat moored to a post 2) a small rock islet with a bush 3) a bare dead tree rising from the water 4) a tall stand of reeds and cattails 5) a tall clump of papyrus 6) a heron nest atop a snag 7) a small buoy on a chain 8) a small wooden fishing platform 9) a wooden dock post with a lantern 10) a tall tuft of pampas grass. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
